description_long: This object is a short sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is dark in color, likely made of metal, and appears robust and functional. The hilt features a rounded pommel and a grip wrapped in a reddish-brown material, possibly leather, providing both comfort and grip. The guard is circular and metallic, with some subtle decorative patterning visible, separating the blade from the handle. The overall design suggests a utilitarian yet slightly ornate weapon, suitable for close combat or ceremonial use. The proportions and materials indicate it is a hand-held object, likely weighing a few kilograms.
description: A short, straight double-edged sword with a dark blade, ornate circular guard, and a wrapped grip with a rounded pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the blade, ornate circular guard, and wrapped handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the blade and the layered construction of the guard and handle.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the blade, guard, and handle visible from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slimness of the blade and the structure of the hilt.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, wrapped in red-brown material, rounded pommel, metallic accents
